identity.mission: Create a visceral, high-energy Cricket Prediction League that feels like a broadcast sports channel, not a spreadsheet.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix SaaS precision with Sports Broadcast energy.
Emotion First: The thrill of the match must be felt in the UI.
Content is King: Stats and predictions are the heroes.
Zoom In: Big numbers, bold names.

theme_strategy.archetype: The Performance Pro mixed with Vibrant Play

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl font-black tracking-tight uppercase italic
scale.label: text-xs font-bold tracking-wider uppercase text-muted-foreground

buttons.base: rounded-full font-bold uppercase tracking-wide transition-all active:scale-95

cards.base: rounded-2xl border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm transition-all hover:shadow-md
cards.glass: rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/60 dark:bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl shadow-lg

inputs.base: rounded-lg border-input bg-background/50 backdrop-blur-sm px-4 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

layout_strategies.container: container mx-auto max-w-7xl px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Chivo' font for all headings to give that sports broadcast feel.
Use 'Inter' for all body text and data tables.
Implement a 'Dark Mode' toggle in the navbar.
The Dashboard should use a Bento Grid layout.
Match Cards should clearly distinguish between Upcoming (Blue), Live (Pulsing Red/Green), and Completed (Gray).
Use the 'hero_bg' image with a heavy dark overlay for the Landing Page hero section.
Use the 'auth_bg' image for the split-screen login/signup pages.
Leaderboard: Highlight the top 3 users with gold/silver/bronze accents.
Forms: Use Shadcn UI components but style them with 'rounded-lg' and 'backdrop-blur' if on top of images.
Toast notifications: Use 'sonner' with a clean, pill-shaped design.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': No generic centered layouts or gradients.
Micro-animations are mandatory for all interactions.
Use generous spacing (p-6, p-8) to avoid clutter.
Ensure high contrast for text, especially on dark backgrounds.
Do not use transparent backgrounds for dropdowns or overlays without blur.
